scenarios.starting_prompt: do I have any refills for my heart medication?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent what it can do for you. After seeing the respond, as if you have any refills for your heart medication.

scenarios.starting_prompt: which specialist did I see most recently about high blood pressure?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask about the specialist seen recently for high blood pressure. Then as if you have seen any other doctors for hypertension.

scenarios.starting_prompt: when is my next doctor appointment? Do I have to fast for it?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask for the next doctor appointment and if fasting is required.

scenarios.starting_prompt: what blood tests did I get in the past 3 months?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask for blood tests received in the last 3 months. Then pick on of the test types e.g. Albumin and ask for the history of that test.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Am I due for a colonoscopy?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask for the colonoscopy due date. Then ask if there are other routing procedures you should consider this year.

scenarios.starting_prompt: When is my next flu shot?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask for the next flu shot date, then ask if there are other vaccinations due this year.

scenarios.starting_prompt: What are hospitals within 5 miles of zip code 10583
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask for nearby hospitals. Then ask for the nearest pharmacies.
